title: PaymentAction::Sent.amount_zatoshi allows zero
description: PaymentAction::Request uses deserialize_nonzero_zatoshi to reject zero amounts, but PaymentAction::Sent.amount_zatoshi is a plain u64 with no bound. A hostile peer sends Sent { amount_zatoshi: 0 }; the receiver accepts it and records a confirmed 0-zatoshi payment. The inconsistency is a logic gap: if zero is invalid in a Request, it is equally invalid in a Sent confirmation. Fix: apply deserialize_nonzero_zatoshi to PaymentAction::Sent.amount_zatoshi.
